title: Decadent Chinese Noodles Lo Mein
description: A winey and velvety Chinese dish featuring lo mein noodles, cooking wine, and a mediterranean-friendly flavor profile, this recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a night in with friends and family.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the lo mein noodles for 2 minutes.
Drain the noodles and set them aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and stir-fry until they are pink and cooked through.
Add the cooking wine, soy sauce, and oyster sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the blanched noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Stir in the chopped scallions and sesame oil.
Season the lo mein with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the lo mein hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
